ticket.subject: Critical: Redis cache cluster offline — all sessions lost
ticket.body: Our main Redis instance went down 8 minutes ago and won't accept connections. Every user session is timing out, checkout is completely broken, and we're seeing cascading 502 errors across the site. Failover to the standby node failed — it's also unreachable. We're hemorrhaging revenue by the minute — this needs immediate escalation to the infrastructure team.
